Our Craft

Services we
take pride in

Book a Service
01

Classic Manicure

A timeless treatment — shaping, cuticle care, and a flawless coat of your chosen colour. Simple, refined, perfect.

From RM 35 — 45 min
02

Gel Extension

Long-lasting gel applied over extensions — sculpted to your ideal length and shape. Weeks of perfect nails without a chip.

From RM 80 — 90 min
03

Nail Art

From minimalist lines to intricate florals — our artists create bespoke designs tailored to your personality and occasion.

From RM 15/nail — varies
04

Chrome & Foil

Mirror-finish chrome or delicate foil overlays that catch the light beautifully. The statement look for every special moment.

From RM 20 add-on — 20 min
05

Pedicure Luxury

A full pedicure ritual — soak, scrub, mask, massage, and polish. Your feet deserve the same artisanal attention as your hands.

From RM 55 — 60 min
06

Bridal Package

Curated for your most important day. Full hands and feet treatment, custom art, and complimentary touch-up service included.

From RM 200 — full package
7+ Years of craft

Our Story

A studio built on
craft and care

Nail Room The Story began as a vision to bring genuine nail artistry to Kuching. We believe that a visit to our studio should feel like stepping into a calm, creative space — not just a service appointment.

Every technician in our team is trained in precision techniques and stays current with global nail trends. From your first consultation to the final stroke of polish, every detail is attended to with intention.

  • Premium, skin-safe products only
  • Fully sterilized tools for every client
  • Custom nail art consultation included
  • Walk-ins welcome — appointments preferred
  • Two convenient locations in Kuching
